text:
<think>I should begin by directly answering the question with the director's name.</think>
"Return of the Jedi" was directed by Richard Marquand.
<think>I should provide a bit more context, such as the year the film was released, for clarity.</think>
The film was released in 1983.
<think>I could add a note about the film's place in the Star Wars saga, which adds useful context.</think>
It is the third installment in the original Star Wars trilogy.
